MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ricky Winata, plaintiff; Susan Parkinson, counsel for plaintiff

Scott Nelson, defendant; Stephanie Oxley Esq. by limited scope representation for defendant

Settlement conference held. Parties entered into signed agreement which was filed. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 706 Kearny Street #104, City and County of San Francisco, California, together with all attendant garage, storage and common areas. See scanned document. Trial date vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Roger Rubin, Clerk Linda Fong, not reported (218)
